queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Hyper' AND publisher = 'ZEIT, Inc.';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Hyper' AND publisher = 'ZEIT, Inc.' AND version_compare(version, '3.4.1') < 0);

refs.8f5d0c85:
# Learn more about .exe install scripts:
# http://fleetdm.com/learn-more-about/exe-install-scripts

$exeFilePath = "${env:INSTALLER_PATH}"

try {

# Hyper is an electron-builder NSIS installer (per-user only). /S = silent.
$processOptions = @{
  FilePath = "$exeFilePath"
  ArgumentList = "/S"
  PassThru = $true
  Wait = $true
}

# Start process and track exit code
$process = Start-Process @processOptions
$exitCode = $process.ExitCode

# Prints the exit code
Write-Host "Install exit code: $exitCode"
Exit $exitCode

} catch {
  Write-Host "Error: $_"
  Exit 1
}
